name: Rippled Glass
description: A pane of rippled glass over the scene behind the window. The blurred backdrop warps across the whole pane under a drifting watery distortion, with slight colour fringing and soft highlights along the ripples. It shows through wherever the window itself is translucent, so pair it with an opacity rule.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Blur radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene behind the glass is blurred (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the glass pane (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Ripple strength
parameters.description: How far the ripples bend the backdrop (px)

parameters.name: Ripple drift
parameters.description: How quickly the ripples drift, where 0 freezes them

parameters.name: Colour fringing
parameters.description: Chromatic split between the red and blue refraction

parameters.name: Ripple highlights
parameters.description: Strength of the light caught along the ripple crests

parameters.name: Tint strength
parameters.description: How much of the tint colour is mixed over the glass
